## What's Changed

- Added real duration metadata for server Local media rows exposed to Tater Tube Player.
- Local movies, TV episodes, folder videos, and music tracks now include `duration`, `durationSeconds`, and `durationDisplay` when FFprobe can read them.
- Added an in-memory duration cache keyed by file path, size, and modified time so repeat browsing does not probe unchanged files again.
- Tape Deck can now show track lengths for Tater Tube Server music once an album is opened.
- The Tube TV Mode can build more accurate live-channel schedules from exact server durations instead of relying on fallback movie/episode lengths.
- Added API test coverage for the player-facing duration fields.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings. Duration metadata is discovered automatically as Local media is browsed.
